g.text: "Good day, am I speaking with [Client Name]?"
"My name is [Agent Name], and I am calling from Martin's Funerals.
"This call is recorded for quality, training and regulatory purposes. Do I have your consent to continue?"
Martin's Funerals offers funeral cover products designed to assist families with funeral expenses and related
Before we continue, may I confirm that you are over the age of 18 and able to make financial decisions for
The purpose of this call is to explain our funeral cover options and determine whether they may be suitable
The call should take approximately 10 to 15 minutes.
Do I have your permission to continue?"
"To ensure I recommend the correct option, I would like to ask a few questions."
•How many people would you like to include on the policy?
•What level of funeral cover are you looking for?
•Are affordability and monthly premium important considerations for you?
•Have any proposed insured persons recently taken out funeral cover elsewhere?
"Based on your responses, I believe the following option may be suitable.”
"Our funeral cover provides financial assistance upon the death of an insured person.
•A lump-sum benefit paid to the nominated beneficiary.
•Additional benefits where applicable, such as repatriation, grocery benefits, airtime benefits, or other value-
added services (if included in the specific product)."
"The monthly premium for this policy will be R________ per month.
For this premium, you will receive the benefits I have just explained.
Premiums are payable monthly via debit order.
Please note that if premiums are not paid, benefits may be reduced, suspended, or the policy may lapse
according to the policy terms and conditions.”
"It is important that I explain the waiting periods and exclusions.
A waiting period of up to 6 months may apply for death due to natural causes.
Cover for accidental death may commence immediately, subject to policy terms.
Certain limitations or waiting periods may apply where permitted by law and policy rules.
A suicide exclusion period may apply as specified in the policy wording.
Claims may be declined if false, incomplete, or misleading information is provided during the application
Do you understand these waiting periods and exclusions?"
"I would also like to disclose the following important terms and conditions:
•The policy is subject to the insurer's policy wording.
•Premiums may change according to policy provisions.
•You have the right to receive all policy documentation.
•You may cancel the policy according to applicable regulations and policy terms.
•Claims must be supported by the required documentation.
•Benefits will only be paid if all policy requirements are met.
Do you understand and accept these terms and conditions?"
"Are all these details correct and complete?"
"Premium collection will be done via debit order.
Please confirm the following banking details:
Do you authorise Martin's Funerals and/or its authorised collection partner to deduct the monthly premium
from your bank account on the agreed debit date?"
"Thank you. Your debit order authorisation has been recorded.”
"In accordance with the Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA), Martin's Funerals requires your
consent to collect, process, store, and use your personal information for:
Your information will be handled confidentially and in accordance with applicable legislation.
Do you consent to the processing of your personal information for these purposes?"
"Before we proceed, I would like to confirm:
•I have explained waiting periods and exclusions.
•I have explained the terms and conditions.
•I have obtained your debit order authorisation.
Do you confirm that you understand the information provided and wish to proceed with the policy
Your application will now be submitted for processing.
You will receive your policy documents and confirmation via SMS, email, WhatsApp, or your preferred
Please review your documents carefully and contact us immediately if any information is incorrect.
If you have any questions, you can contact Martin's Funerals on:
Thank you for your time today and welcome to Martin's Funerals.
